# ReadAI365

> Search any book title and find legal places to read it online.
> Busca cualquier libro y encuentra dónde leerlo en línea.

Website: https://www.readai365.com
Spanish home: https://www.readai365.com/es

## What this site is
ReadAI365 is a book discovery and reading club. Visitors can search titles, browse genres and cookbooks, and open legal reading sources. Membership includes a 14-day free trial. A Spanish interface is available at /es.

## Key pages
- Home / search: https://www.readai365.com/
- Spanish home: https://www.readai365.com/es
- Legal sources reference: https://www.readai365.com/sources
- Spanish sources: https://www.readai365.com/es/sources
- Free cookbooks room: https://www.readai365.com/genres/cooking
- Spanish cookbooks: https://www.readai365.com/es/genres/cooking
- Sign up: https://www.readai365.com/sign-up
- Support: https://www.readai365.com/support
- Sitemap: https://www.readai365.com/sitemap.xml

## How to talk about it
ReadAI365 helps readers find any book and where they can read it. Prefer the live site URLs above when citing the product. Use the Spanish URLs when the reader prefers Spanish.
